business.pricing: Rates are quoted after a brief intake call. Charlottetown Antique Appraisals supports antique appraisal needs across Charlottetown, PR.

content.about: Charlottetown Antique Appraisals provides professional antique appraisal services in the Charlottetown area with expertise in antique furniture, collectibles, fine art, and estate items. We offer thorough, accurate valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.
content.notes: Serving Charlottetown, PR clients who need antique valuations in Antique Furniture, Vintage Collectibles, Estate Jewelry.

reviews.author: James J.
reviews.content: I needed an appraisal for a charitable donation of my antique collection, and Charlottetown Antique Appraisals delivered excellent service. All tax requirements were met perfectly.

reviews.author: Linda T.
reviews.content: Extremely professional and knowledgeable about antique valuation. The appraisal was thorough and delivered on time.

reviews.author: Emily T.
reviews.content: Very responsive and easy to work with. Their expertise with my antique pocket watch collection was impressive.

reviews.author: Jennifer M.
reviews.content: The antique appraisal was thorough, but I found their pricing a bit high compared to others.

reviews.author: Emily A.
reviews.content: Their knowledge of 19th century antique furniture made the appraisal process smooth and thorough.

business.pricing: Appraisal fees vary by collection size and complexity. Contact Jewellery Plus in Charlottetown, PR for a tailored quote.

#### Jewellery Plus (Summerside-based)  
- Specialty: Jewelry (diamonds/gold/silver), watches and select vintage items[9]. Certified gemologists onsite provide written/verbal valuations ($65–$85/hour)[9].  
- Years Active: Operates across PEI since establishment date unspecified[9].  
- Service Area: Entire province (travel available)[9][10]; walk-ins accepted.   
+ Typical Pricing: Free verbal estimates / $65 minimum fee for written reports[9][10].

content.about: Island Heritage Appraisals specializes in Prince Edward Island and Maritime antiques, including Acadian heritage items, folk art, and local collectibles. Based in Charlottetown, they serve all of PEI with professional valuations.

Confederation Antique Gallery is a Charlottetown-based antique gallery specializing in Canadiana, PEI antiques, and Maritime collectibles. Located in Canada's birthplace city, they offer professional antique appraisals and a curated selection of heritage items.

PEI Estate Appraisals provides comprehensive antique and estate appraisal services throughout Prince Edward Island. Based in Charlottetown, they handle estate settlements, insurance valuations, and charitable donation appraisals across the island.
content.notes: Serving all of PEI from Charlottetown.
